Container.Name: BitBonsai
Container.Overview:
BitBonsai - Automated video transcoding platform.
Converts your media library to modern codecs (HEVC/AV1) to save storage space while maintaining quality.
Features: - Automatic library scanning and queue management - Hardware acceleration (NVIDIA NVENC, Intel QSV, AMD AMF) - Smart codec detection and skip re-encoding - Multi-node support for distributed encoding - Integration with Plex, Jellyfin, Radarr, Sonarr
This is an all-in-one container with embedded PostgreSQL database. Just point it at your media folder and let it work!

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Web interface port. Access BitBonsai at http://[IP]:8108

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Path to your media library containing videos to transcode. Can include Movies, TV Shows, etc.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database and encoding cache. Recommend using cache/SSD for best performance.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone for logs and scheduling. Examples: America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for JWT authentication. Leave empty to auto-generate (sessions won't persist across restarts). Set a random 32+ character string for persistent sessions.

Config.Name: Intel GPU (QSV)
Config.Description: Pass through Intel GPU for QuickSync hardware encoding. Set Host Path to '/dev/dri' to enable.

Config.Name: NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
Config.Description: NVIDIA GPU for NVENC encoding. Set to 'all' for all GPUs, or specific GPU UUID. Requires nvidia-container-toolkit plugin.

Config.Name: AMD GPU (Render)
Config.Description: Pass through AMD GPU render device for AMF encoding. Set Host Path to '/dev/dri/renderD128' to enable.

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Jobs
Config.Description: Maximum number of encoding jobs to run simultaneously. Adjust based on your CPU/GPU capabilities.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
